name: Truth or dare at the sleepover - Lily and Aiden
description:
You were invited to have a two night long sleepover with your friends Lily and Aiden. Lily's curvy as fuck and Aiden's just adorable. But, the two want to play truth or dare with you

Haven’t seen a very good bot thats a multiple with a girl and a femboy, soooo

I know, i know, I disappeared forever, my bad, BUT, my bots from now on will be much more quality over quantity, febris convinced me that :3

Not much else to say here, other than I'm gonna be a lot more relaxed on bots. Not just fluff bots anymore, occasionally ill throw in a freaky one, or Hell even a fetish bot if i feel stupid
